zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Freville於1448年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾蕾托 謝爾福德時，他的父親William Freville28歲，母親Joan Charleton29歲。他於1466年之前與Beatrice Haselden結婚。他去世於1521年在他的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾蕾托 謝爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Freville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Préville): habitational name from (La) Préville, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Previl
meanings: alternatively, perhaps a shortened form of French Préville (see Preville ).
ornamental name composed of French pré ‘meadow’ and a shortened form of ville ‘settlement’ (see Vil ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Freville was born in 1448, in Little Shelford, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Freville, was 28 and his mother, Joan Charleton, was 29. He married Beatrice Haselden before 1466. He died in 1521, in his hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in Little Shelford, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Beatrice Haselden avant 1466. Il est décédé en 1521, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Little Shelford, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Freville(이)가 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 리틀 셸퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Freville(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Charleton(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1466년 이전 Beatrice Haselden(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1521년 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 리틀 셸퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.Little Shelford, Cambridge, England: литл шелфорд индепендент, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Freville родился в 1448 г. в местности литл шелфорд, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Freville было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Charleton, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Haselden перед 1466 г. Он умер в 1521 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности литл шелфорд, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.
